recommendations.title: The Hunter's Prayer
recommendations.overview: An assassin forges an unlikely partnership with one of his targets: a woman seeking revenge for the murder of her family.

recommendations.title: Surrogates
recommendations.overview: Set in a futuristic world where humans live in isolation and interact through surrogate robots, a cop is forced to leave his home for the first time in years in order to investigate the murders of others' surrogates.

recommendations.title: Joshua Tree
recommendations.overview: A Los Angeles police detective tracks a fugitive who heads for the desert with a deputy sheriff as hostage.

recommendations.title: U-571

recommendations.title: The Ruins
recommendations.overview: Americans Amy, Stacy, Jeff and Eric look for fun during a sunny holiday in Mexico, but they get much more than that after visiting an archaeological dig in the jungle.
